title: Go, Go Second Time Virgin
original_title: ゆけゆけ二度目の処女
overview: Go, Go, Second Time Virgin is the story of two damned and abused teenagers who meet and fall in mutant love on a Tokyo rooftop. Their only hope is to cement their love with an escape into oblivion.
